title: Crispy Peppy Whole Wheat Stir-fry
description: A festive Ethiopian dish featuring whole wheat mixed with vegetables and spices, served as a savory side or light meal.
instructions: Boil the whole wheat pasta according to package instructions.
Chop mixed vegetables into small pieces.
In a pan, heat oil over medium-high heat. Add chopped vegetables and spices; sauté for about 5 minutes until vegetables are slightly softened.
Add cooked whole wheat pasta to the vegetable mixture and mix well with vegetables.
Pour tahini sauce and water/vegetable broth into the pan. Stir everything together thoroughly, allowing it to cook for another minute or two until all ingredients are evenly coated.
Serve hot as a side dish or light meal.
